channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Teens sue Elon Musk’s xAI over Grok’s AI-generated CSAM
item.description: Three Tennessee teens are suing Elon Musk's xAI over claims that the company's Grok AI chatbot generated sexualized images and videos of themselves as minors, as reported earlier by The Washington Post. The proposed class action lawsuit, filed on Monday, accuses Musk and other xAI leaders of knowing that Grok would produce AI-generated child sexual […]...

item.title: Jensen just put Nvidia’s Blackwell and Vera Rubin sales projections into the $1 trillion stratosphere
item.description: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang said he expects $1 trillion worth of orders for the chips.

item.title: ‘The Last of Us’ Season 3 Just Cast Patrick Wilson to Die Immediately
item.description: The 'Watchmen' actor and Jason Ritter have joined the HBO series.

item.title: Archaeologists Unearth 43,000 Ancient Egyptian Receipts, Notes, and ‘To Do’ Lists
item.description: An excavation spanning over 11 years is turning up valuable information about everyday life in old Egypt.

item.title: Ecovacs’ Deebot X8 and X9 Pro Omni robovacs are nearly 50 percent off
item.description: If you like the idea of spring cleaning but not the part where you actually have to clean, both the Ecovacs Deebot X8 Pro Omni and newer X9 Pro Omni have dropped to their lowest prices to date ahead of Amazon’s Big Spring Sale, which officially kicks off on March 25th. The X8 Pro Omni is available […]

item.title: Nvidia Wants to Slop-ify Your PC Games With Its New AI Upscaler
item.description: You'll love DLSS 5 if you can't get enough of ugly, uncanny, and overly textured AI slop.

item.title: Warren presses Pentagon over decision to grant xAI access to classified networks
item.description: Sen. Elizabeth Warren noted that Grok, xAI's controversial chatbot, has created harmful outputs for users and poses a potential national security risk.

item.title: Asteroid Ryugu Contains All 5 DNA and RNA Building Blocks, Study Shows
item.description: A new study adds to a growing body of evidence that suggests asteroid impacts played a critical role in the emergence of life on our planet.

item.title: File Your Taxes With TurboTax Full Service Now Before Prices Go Up
item.description: Procrastinators get penalized. File your taxes through TurboTax before March 18 for $150.

item.title: Benjamin Netanyahu is struggling to prove he’s not an AI clone
item.description: Social media platforms are currently awash with conspiracy theories claiming that Benjamin Netanyahu has been killed or injured and replaced by AI-generated deepfakes. Between clips that supposedly show the Israeli prime minister sporting extra fingers and drinking from a bottomless, gravity-defying cup of coffee, only one thing is apparent: Reality used to be much easier […]...

item.title: Teens Sue xAI Over Sexualized Images Generated by Grok
item.description: Sexualized images of the girls, created by Grok, were allegedly shared across Discord and Telegram groups.

item.title: We Met Disney’s Most Advanced Robot Yet: Olaf From ‘Frozen’
item.description: The life-size, walking, talking robot will debut in parks later this month, representing huge leaps for Disney.

item.title: Nvidia says China’s BYD and Geely will use its robotaxi platform
item.description: Nvidia added two leading Chinese automakers, BYD and Geely, to its robotaxi program, as the chipmaker seeks to put its stamp on the growing autonomous vehicle market worldwide. At its GTC conference today, Nvidia announced that BYD and Geely, as well as Isuzu and Nissan, would use the chipmaker's Drive Hyperion platform, which combines the […]

item.title: I met Olaf — the Frozen robot who might be the future of Disney Parks
item.description: You know Olaf. Before KPop Demon Hunters, before the Wicked movies, it was Disney's Frozen that blasted show tunes like "Let It Go" and "Into the Unknown" into our lives. My little girls loved belting those tunes. So when I met Olaf, the Disney Imagineering robot, I kept thinking: I can't wait for my kids […]

item.title: Memories AI is building the visual memory layer for wearables and robotics
item.description: Memories.ai is building a large visual memory model that can index and retrieve video-recorded memories for physical AI.

item.title: 'Four months' worth of work' — Disney Imagineering built a walking Olaf robot and imagines 'an entire world populated with characters you know and love'
item.description: TechRadar spoke with Kyle Laughlin, SVP of R&D, Technology and Engineering at Walt Disney Imagineering, about how Disney built a walking Olaf robot in just four months — and why it could lead to parks filled with roaming characters.

item.title: New research calls Waymo the ‘Kool-Aid man’ of the ride-share economy
item.description: Alphabet’s self-driving car company is “kicking down the walls of an entrenched industry.” Uber, Lyft, and Tesla may have trouble keeping up. A new research note just named Waymo the “Kool-Aid man” of the ride-haling economy.

item.title: DLSS 5 : comment Nvidia exploite le rendu neuronal pour métamorphoser vos jeux PC
item.description: Le DLSS 5 de Nvidia se montre en amont de son lancement officiel en automne prochain. Voici comment fonctionne techniquement cette évolution majeure du DLSS qui promet de changer fondamentalement le rendu de nos jeux sur PC.

item.title: Meatpackers are on strike for the first time in 40 years. Beef industry labor disputes may be rare by design
item.description: Union leaders say meat processing companies often rely on vulnerable workers who are less likely to push back against unfair practices. Nearly 4,000 workers at a Colorado meatpacking plant went on strike on Monday, marking the first labor strike at a U.S. slaughterhouse in more than four decades.

item.title: What’s New in the AirPods Max 2? Breaking Down Apple’s Headphone Update
item.description: Apple’s premium over-ears finally have a proper successor, but after five years of waiting, it’s hard not to wonder: “Is that it?”

item.title: Sony's enhanced PSSR upscaling arrives on PS5 Pro today
item.description: Sony's upgraded PlayStation Spectral Super Resolution (PSSR) tech is rolling out as part of the PlayStation 5 Pro system update that's available today. The company had teased last month that this update was in the works. These improvements should be a better reflection of why you might pay a premium price for the more powerful console if you value peak image quality in gaming.For a very surface-level definition, PSSR is Sony's upscaling tech. It uses an AI library for a pixel-by-pixel analysis to display a game with better visuals even while running at a lower resolution. Today's update revamp...

item.title: xAI is being sued by teens who say Grok created CSAM using their photos
item.description: xAI, which is already facing multiple investigations around the world over widespread reports that Grok repeatedly created sexualized images of children, is now facing a class action lawsuit. Three teenagers, who allege that photos of them were used by Grok to generate child exploitation material, have filed a class action lawsuit against xAI in California. According to the lawsuit, one of the teens was alerted last December that someone was sharing AI-generated images and videos of her and other minors "in settings with which she was familiar, but morphed into sexually explicit poses." The i...

item.title: Samsung bets this island startup can tame the grid with software and batteries
item.description: GridBeyond's hardware and software coordinates several gigawatts of supply and demand to help balance the flow of electricity on the grid. The idea has attracted investors like Samsung Ventures.

item.title: What is the release date for Scrubs season 10 episode 5 on Hulu and Disney+?
item.description: Scrubs season 10 reaches its midpoint with this week's episode — here's when and where you can watch it.
